title: Best Bundles
description: Bundles, the better way nature intended. Dyeable, with 4x increased capacity!  Enables the bundle without having to enable the experimental data pack.  Now updated for 1.21.11!
body:
![Best Bundles](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1ce2244aa85cbd8db4d7b7c6347674b9b716d292.png)

## Description
Do you want to use Bundles, but find them lackluster?  *Best Bundles* upgrades the bundle and makes it suitable for use in a vanilla-friendly way.

### Features:
- Fill bundles with up to 4 full stacks worth of items
- Dye/re-dye bundles in any one of 5,713,438 colors by crafting them with any dye
- Remove the dye by using the bundle on a cauldron containing water
- Compatible with [Bundles Beyond](https://modrinth.com/mod/bundles-beyond) (as of Minecraft 1.21.2)
- Use bundles without enabling the experimental data pack (prior to Minecraft 1.21.2)
- In-game documentation is available via [Treatise](https://modrinth.com/mod/treatise) if installed

There are two main releases for 1.21.1- `1.21.1-1.0.2_no_leather_recipe` and `1.21.1-1.0.2`.  they are identical except that `1.21.1-1.0.2_no_leather_recipe` does not include the backport of the new bundle recipe that needs only 1 leather. 

> If you like this mod, consider using [Vanilla Sprinkles](https://modrinth.com/mod/vanilla-sprinkles) for additional features!

See below for a short video tutorial from our [YouTube channel](https://www.youtube.com/@dentedleftgaming).

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/rDDHKHjiaUQ" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## Support
If you have a bug report, feature request, or any other type of issue, please post on our GitHub [issues page](https://github.com/DentedLeft/Dented-Modding/issues).  This is an issues page for all of our mods, so be sure to include the mod's name and version in your post.  We appreciate all feedback!

If you'd like to support development, you can leave a tip at our [BuyMeACoffee](https://buymeacoffee.com/dentedleft).  Only if it's within your means- otherwise, using, sharing, and enjoying the mod is support enough.  Thank you!
